walnut-king-pie-argiro.name: Walnut King Pie
instructions: All materials at room temperature.
Beat the eggs with sugar in the mixer for 6–7–1 until the mixture hangs.
Add the butter and beat until it absorbs it.
In orange juice, dilute the baking soda and add it to the mixer.
Add the zest, salt and cognac.
At low mixing speed, add the flour until we have a thick porridge.
Immediately afterwards, add the walnut and raisins.

In a buttered and flowered 28 cm baking pan, pour the basil pie with walts and raisins and baking in a preheated oven at 170°C in the air on the medium grill, for 45′-50′′′. (If we want to get the whole pie out of the baking pan, we must before we have the mixture to make the baking pan – which we have already buttered – with parchment blues).
After baking, sprinkle the basil pie with powder sugar.
So how much prettier to begin time with such symbolisms on our table. Positive thoughts and beautiful wishes to fill our home, our hearts and our lives!
Learn the secret about the most fluffy basil pie and take a look at the holiday recipe below for dessert.

walnut-streusel-pumpkin-bread.name: Walnut Streusel Pumpkin Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C) with oven rack in center position. Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.

Beat ½ cup softened butter and white sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy; beat in pumpkin purée, eggs, ¼ cup brown sugar, and vanilla extract until incorporated. Set aside.

Sift 1 ½ cups flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger together into a separate large bowl; beat ½ into pumpkin mixture on low speed until incorporated. Add remaining ½ flour mixture alternating with milk, mixing until batter is smooth; do not overmix. Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan.
Combine walnuts, ½ cup cold butter, ¼ cup brown sugar, oats, and ¼ cup flour in a medium bowl with a fork to form large crumbles; sprinkle over batter in the pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, about 65 minutes. Cool completely before serving.

weeknight-skillet-lasagna.name: Weeknight Skillet Lasagna

ingredients.item: Two 24 oz. jar rao’s homemade marinara sauce

instructions:
Preheat the oven to 425 with a rack in the top third. In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook the noodles, stirring a few times to prevent sticking, until very al dente, about 6 minutes. Drain.
Meanwhile, wrap the thawed spinach in a clean kitchen towel and wring out as much excess liquid as possible. Transfer to a medium bowl and combine with the ricotta, parmesan, 1 teaspoon of salt, and ¼ teaspoon of pepper.
Heat oil in a 10-inch high-sided ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Add the beef and season with salt and pepper; break up into small pieces with a wooden spoon and cook, turning a few times, until the meat is browned, about 8 minutes.
Drain excess fat from the skillet and scrape the browned beef into a large heatproof bowl. Set aside 1 ½ cups of Rao’s Homemade Marinara sauce and stir the remaining marinara into the bowl with the browned beef.
Using the same skillet, (do not return to the heat) spread about 1 cup of the sauce mixture in a thin layer at the bottom of the skillet. Arrange a third of the noodles over the sauce, breaking the noodles up to fit if necessary, and spread half of the remaining sauce mixture over the noodles. Dollop with half of the spinach-ricotta mixture and sprinkle with a third of the mozzarella. Repeat layering one time with another third of the noodles, the remaining half of the sauce mixture, the remaining half of the spinach-ricotta mixture and another third of the mozzarella.
Top lasagna with the remaining third of the noodles and spread the reserved marinara sauce over the top. Sprinkle with the remaining third of the mozzarella and bake lasagna until golden and bubbly, about 25 minutes.
Let sit 10 minutes before serving. Sprinkle with parmesan.

white-bean-salad-step-by-step-comedera.name: White Bean Salad Step By Step
white-bean-salad-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Ensalada de judías blancas paso a paso

ingredients.item: Pimento: two small (one green and one red)

instructions: If you have no baked beans, wash, select and cook them in an express pot. Take a 400 g measure after they are cooked. If you have boat beans, run directly and pour into a bowl.
Lavar y cortar en trozos la cebolla, los pimientos, la manzana, el tomate y el pepino. Incorporar al bol.
Cortar el aguacate en cubos. Lavar y separar las hojas del ramo de perejil. Reservar.
Incorporate vinegar, pint and oil. Mix all the ingredients with care to put no pressure to avoid losing the texture of vegetables and beans.
Finally, decorate with avocado cubes and parsley leaves. A little more salt, vinegar and oil can be added to splinter the ornament if desired.

white-chocolate-tangerine-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Tangerine
instructions: 1. Take the egg yolks into the liquor and sugar glass bowl.
2. Place the bowl on a container with boiling water inside.
3. Beat the mixture with the mixer until it is rough.
4. Take the glass bowl through boiling water.
5. Cook the cream with the mixer until it is rough in another container.
6. Add the cream and melted chocolate on the mixture with liquor, and then whisk with the mixer again.
7. Fill the mixture into a shaped caliba you want and wait until it is solidified in the refrigerator.
8. Wait the leaf gelatin to soften in cold water.
9. Take the leaf gelatin from the water by tightening the water with your hands.
10. Boil tangerine juice and sugar in a saucepan for Tangerine jelly.
11. 11. Add gelatin and mix thoroughly.
12. Hold in the refrigerator to pour into a mold so as to be a cm thick.
12. August Mix the vine slices in a bowl with pomegranate grains for grapes.

white-cookies-with-mastic-mastic-lezzet.name: White Cookies With Mastic Mastic
instructions: 1. The butter kneads the powder sugar and drip gum from a wide container.
2. The flour, wheat starch and sunflower oil, and knead the whole material until it is thoroughly crushed.
3. Combine walnut size parts from dough and rolling and index to oil paper series oven tray.
4. Pre-heated 180 degree cook in oven for 15 minutes.
5. Take and cool on the wire grid.
6. Serve the powdered sugar on the bases.

white-rotisserie-chicken-chili.name: White Rotisserie Chicken Chili
instructions: Combine cannellini beans, chicken stock, rotisserie chicken, corn, chiles, chili seasoning, bouillon granules, onion powder, and black pepper in a pot; bring to boil.
Reduce heat; simmer at least 1 hour. Add sour cream during the last 15 minutes of cooking; stir to combine. Garnish with cilantro.

whole-grain-breakfast-cookies.name: Whole Grain Breakfast Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
Pulse walnuts in the bowl of a food processor until ground into a flour; transfer to a bowl. Stir in oats, flax meal, whole wheat flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt until thoroughly combined.

Combine almond butter, brown sugar, canola oil, agave nectar, egg, and vanilla extract in the bowl of a food processor; pulse to blend well. Transfer almond butter mixture to a large bowl; fold in chocolate chips and dried cherries. Stir oatmeal mixture into almond butter mixture; dough will be very thick.
Scoop dough by heaping teaspoons; roll into balls and place on the prepared baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.

Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from the oven; flatten cookies with a spatula. Cool on the baking sheets for about 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks to finish cooling.

whole-wheat-waffle-sticks.name: Whole Wheat Waffle Sticks
instructions: Preheat the Griddler, fitted with the waffle plates, to 191°C (190°C), and grease with nonstick spray.
Whisk the eggs in a large mixing bowl until smooth.
Add the Greek yogurt and whisk again until smooth.
Whisk in the milk, oil, and maple syrup.
Add the flour, baking powder, and baking soda, and whisk together until the batter is smooth and well combined.
Use a 1-cup (130 G) measuring cup to pour batter onto the Griddler.
Cook for 10 minutes, until the waffle has puffed up and is golden brown. Transfer the waffle to a cutting board and repeat with the remaining batter.
Cut the waffles into sticks.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with maple syrup.
Enjoy!

wine-and-cheese-strata.name: Wine And Cheese Strata
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Arrange bread pieces in the prepared baking dish; drizzle with melted butter. Top with Swiss cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, and ham.

Whisk milk, eggs, green onions, sherry, mustard, black pepper, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl until foamy; pour over bread mixture. Cover dish tightly with aluminum foil and refrigerate for 24 hours.
Remove dish from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Bake strata in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Remove aluminum foil and top with sour cream and Parmesan cheese. Bake, uncovered, until a knife inserted in the strata comes out clean, about 10 more minutes.
